overall.description: A first-person walk along a wet futuristic highway at dusk in a dystopian game world (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring passing vehicles, massive circular wind turbines, and neon-lit city landmarks. The camera pans to reveal mountainous terrain before approaching a large digital billboard as light rain begins to fall.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder, observing the distant city skyline with neon lotus signs

notable_agents.action: black truck driving past on the wet highway

entered.detail: massive circular wind turbine with ring structure on tall support
large glowing pink neon lotus flower sign marking the city entrance
large digital billboard advertising SO STRONG IT BLOWS with bottle image
red and white striped concrete barrier along the road edge
tall electrical pylon with multiple crossbars and wires
distant futuristic city skyline with various buildings and towers
rocky dirt slope with sparse vegetation beside the guardrail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet multi-lane highway at dusk, with the camera walking along the shoulder. A massive circular wind turbine stands on the left while pink neon lotus signs glow in the distant city center. Vehicles occasionally pass by on the slick asphalt as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with mountainous wind farm landscape

events.description: camera pans sharply left to reveal mountain range and additional wind turbines
camera turns back to face forward along the highway

agents.ego_description: pausing forward movement to pan and survey the landscape, looking at the wind turbines on the left before returning to the forward path

notable_agents.action: yellow vehicle driving on the highway from left to right

entered.detail: distant mountain silhouette against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to survey the landscape, revealing a mountain range behind the massive wind turbines. After a brief view of the terrain, it turns back to face the highway, with the city skyline and pink lotus sign returning to view as the walk continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder approaching large advertisement billboard

events.description: light rain begins to fall, visible as streaks in the air and on the camera lens
camera tilts upward to focus on the billboard from below

agents.ego_description: approaching the large billboard while walking, then stopping to look up at the advertisement as rain begins to fall

notable_agents.action: dark truck driving past on the wet road

entered.detail: visible rain streaks falling through the air, creating atmospheric effect

segments.scene_description: As the camera approaches the large digital billboard, light rain begins to fall, creating streaks in the dim light. The camera moves closer to the billboard advertising SO STRONG IT BLOWS, eventually tilting upward to view it from directly below as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rain-slicked futuristic highway that transitions from a wide industrial vista to an intimate encounter with a towering digital advertisement. It begins on the shoulder of a multi-lane road at dusk, moving past a massive circular wind turbine while pink neon lotus signs glow in the distant city center. As the camera turns left to survey a rugged mountain range behind the turbines, the perspective then shifts back to the highway to resume the forward journey toward the skyline. The scene then evolves as light rain begins to fall, creating streaks in the dim light while the camera approaches a large digital billboard. Finally, the movement culminates as the camera reaches the advertisement for SO STRONG IT BLOWS, tilting upward to view the massive screen from directly below.
